name: Skeena Resources Limited
description: Skeena Resources Limited is a Canadian mining exploration and development company focused on revitalizing the past-producing Eskay Creek gold-silver mine and the Snip gold mine, both located in the Golden Triangle of northwest British Columbia, Canada. The company is primarily engaged in the exploration and development of precious metal properties. Skeena's flagship project, Eskay Creek, was once the highest-grade gold and silver mine in the world. The company aims to transition into a leading gold-silver producer by leveraging its high-grade assets and strategic location in a premier mining jurisdiction.
